message:
feat(error): add context overflow detection and retryable error classification

Implement two pi-mono-parity error classification functions with
comprehensive test coverage:

is_context_overflow():
- Matches all 15 pi-mono overflow substring patterns (case-insensitive):
  "prompt is too long", "exceeds the context window", "too many tokens",
  "context_length_exceeded", etc.
- 6 regex patterns for dynamic variants: "input token count.*exceeds
  the maximum", "maximum context length is \d+ tokens", etc.
- Cerebras/Mistral status code patterns: "4XX (no body)"
- Silent overflow detection: usage_input_tokens > context_window
- Backed by OnceLock<RegexSet> for lazy, thread-safe compilation

is_retryable_error():
- Returns false for empty messages and context overflow (those need
  compaction, not retry)
- Matches transient patterns via OnceLock<Regex>: overloaded, rate
  limit, 429/500/502/503/504, service unavailable, connection errors,
  fetch failed, upstream connect, reset before headers, terminated,
  retry delay

src/rpc.rs integration:
- run_prompt_with_retry() now calls is_retryable_error() before
  retrying, breaking the retry loop for context overflow and auth
  failures instead of wasting retry budget

40+ unit tests covering every pattern, case insensitivity, negative
cases, and the overflow-blocks-retry interaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
